zh.lifeSummary: 當William Kilham於1530年出生在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲時，他的父親Walter Kilham35歲，母親Mary Alice Leister27歲。他於1557年與Elizabeth H. Clements在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1586年10月在他的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。

nameMeanings.name: Kilham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Kilham (ER Yorks), Kilham in Cantley (WR Yorks), or Kilham in Kirknewton (Northumb).

variants.name: Killham
meanings: English: from any of several places in northern England called Kilham, most of which are recorded as Killum in medieval documents, from an Old English prepositional phrase meaning ‘at the kilns’.

variants.name: Killam
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire): variant of Kilham, a habitational name from any of the places in Northumberland and Yorkshire, so named either from Old English cylnum ‘(at) the kilns’, dative plural of cyln, or from Old English cyln ‘kiln’ or the personal name Cylla + Old Norse holmr ‘small island, water meadow’. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When William Kilham was born in 1530, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, his father, Walter Kilham, was 35 and his mother, Mary Alice Leister, was 27. He married Elizabeth H. Clements in 1557, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in October 1586, in his hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Kilham est né en 1530, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Walter Kilham, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mary Alice Leister, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth H. Clements en 1557, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en octobre 1586, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: William Kilham(이)가 1530년 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Kilham(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Alice Leister(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1557년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Elizabeth H. Clements(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1586년 10월 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Kilham родился в 1530 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Kilham было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Alice Leister, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth H. Clements в 1557 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер октябрь 1586 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия.
